zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood於1373年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，他的父親John Maxwell 4th of Pollok36歲，母親Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD35歲。他於1395年與Elizabeth Danielstoun在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1424年8月17日在法國諾門迪艾維易爾-素爾-阿福享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood于1373年出生在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，他的父亲John Maxwell 4th of Pollok36岁，母亲Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD35岁。他于1395年与Elizabeth Danielstoun在英国苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1424年8月17日在法国諾門迪艾維易爾-素爾-阿福享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood was born in 1373, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, was 35. He married Elizabeth Danielstoun in 1395, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 August 1424, in Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood est né en 1373, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Danielstoun en 1395, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 août 1424, à Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood 1373 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Maxwell 4th of Pollok 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD 35. Er hat 1395 in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Danielstoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. August 1424 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood è nato il nel 1373 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Danielstoun nel 1395, nel Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 agosto 1424, nel Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwoodが1373年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父John Maxwell 4th of Pollokは36歳，母Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORDは35歳であった。1395年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでElizabeth Danielstounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1424年8月17日にフランスノーマンディエウアバーネウイル-スル-アvアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood(이)가 1373년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Maxwell 4th of Pollok(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Elizabeth Danielstoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 8월 17일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 베른우이-수-아브르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood nasceu em 1373, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Danielstoun em 1395, em Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1424, em Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood родился в 1373 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Maxwell 4th of Pollok было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Danielstoun в 1395 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 августа 1424 г. в местности вирнеуил-сур-авр, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood nació en 1373, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Danielstoun en 1395, en Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1424, en Verneuil-sur-Avre, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
